toolsIndex.title: Free business tools
toolsIndex.sub: No signup, no cost. Generate invoices, quotations, receipts and more, ready to download as PDF, in any currency with a configurable VAT/tax rate.

about.title: Built in Oman, for the businesses of the GCC
about.lead: Paper & Pen is the cloud ERP we wished existed: simple enough to start in five minutes, powerful enough to run the whole company, and finally built for how business actually works in Oman and the Gulf.
about.body1: Paper & Pen is made by Paper and Pen Company LLC, part of BHD Group, Oman's AI-first conglomerate. We build software in Oman, by Omanis, for GCC businesses, with Arabic as a first-class language, OMR billing native to the core, and local payment built in.
about.body2: Thousands of quotes, invoices and payments flow through Paper & Pen. Sales & Invoicing is free forever because every business deserves professional tools, and you only pay when you grow into inventory, HR, accounting or manufacturing.

contact.title: Talk to us
contact.lead: Questions, demos, partnerships, we reply fast. The quickest way to reach us is WhatsApp.

security.title: Your data, protected
security.lead: Security and privacy are built into Paper & Pen from the ground up.
items: Encrypted in transit (TLS) and at rest
Isolated database per tenant, your data is never shared
Role-based access control and audit trails
Payments handled by Paymob, a PCI-DSS compliant gateway
Hosted on hardened infrastructure with monitoring

Free invoicing software,
for businesses everywhere
fi.subtitle: Create and send professional, tax-ready invoices in one click, in any currency and 5 languages. Quotations, receipts, payment reminders and full accounting. Free forever.
fi.b3: Send by WhatsApp or email in 1 click
fi.docsSub: From the first quote to the final receipt, Paper & Pen creates every document your business sends, then keeps them organised and reconciled automatically.

invoices.d: Customisable, VAT-ready invoices with your logo, sent in seconds.

quotes.d: Win work with branded quotes that convert to invoices in one click.

receipts.d: Auto-generate receipts the moment a payment is recorded.

po.d: Raise and track purchase orders to your suppliers.

recurring.d: Automate repeat billing for subscriptions and retainers.

reminders.d: Automatic, polite reminders so you get paid on time.

s1.title: From quote to cash, without the chasing
s1.body: Convert quotes to invoices, share by WhatsApp, and let automatic reminders do the follow-up. See exactly who has viewed and paid.

s2.title: Any currency, any tax rate, handled for you
s2.body: Invoice in any currency, set your own VAT or sales-tax rate, and work in Arabic or English. GCC businesses get native OMR/AED/SAR billing, 5% VAT and local payment out of the box.
s2.i1: Configurable VAT / sales tax on the net
s2.i3: Tax returns and reports built in

fi.cmpTitle: The free invoicing software made for here

faq.a1: Yes. Invoicing, quotations and payment tracking are free forever for up to 3 users, with no credit card required.
faq.a2: Yes. VAT is calculated automatically on the post-discount net, and you can produce VAT-compliant invoices and returns.
faq.q3: Can I send invoices in Arabic?
faq.a3: Yes. Invoices, quotes and receipts render in full Arabic (RTL) or English, switchable per document.
faq.a4: Yes. Connect Paymob and customers can pay invoices online by card. Payments reconcile automatically.

pricingFaq.q1: Is the free plan really free forever?
pricingFaq.a1: Yes. Sales & Invoicing is free forever for up to 3 users, with no credit card and no expiry. You only pay if you add modules like Inventory, HR or Accounting.
pricingFaq.q2: Can I change or cancel modules later?
pricingFaq.a2: Anytime. Add or remove paid modules whenever you like, your billing adjusts automatically. There is no lock-in contract.
pricingFaq.q3: How am I billed and in which currency?
pricingFaq.a3: Billing is in Omani Rial (OMR) to 3 decimals, monthly or annually (save 20% on annual). Card payments are processed securely through Paymob.

tool.signupCta: Save & manage your documents in Paper & Pen

homeFaq.a1: Yes. The Sales & Invoicing module is free forever, with no credit card required and no time limit. You can create quotes, invoices and record payments for up to 3 users. Add paid modules like Inventory, HR or Accounting only when you need them.
homeFaq.q2: Does Paper & Pen work in Arabic?
homeFaq.a2: Fully. The entire interface is available in Arabic with proper right-to-left layout, alongside English, Hindi, Bengali and Urdu. Switch language any time, your data stays exactly the same.
homeFaq.q3: Can I use Paper & Pen outside the GCC?
homeFaq.a3: Yes. Paper & Pen is built in Oman by Paper and Pen Company LLC (part of BHD Group) but works for businesses anywhere. Invoice in any currency, set your own tax rate, and work in 5 languages. GCC businesses also get native OMR/AED/SAR billing, local VAT and Paymob payments out of the box.
homeFaq.a4: Under 5 minutes. Choose your workspace name, confirm your email, pick your modules and you are ready to invoice. No installation, no consultant, no setup fee.

trust.title: Built in Oman. Trusted by businesses worldwide.
trust.sub: Arabic-first, multi-currency and tax-ready, Paper & Pen fits businesses in the GCC and far beyond, while keeping the simplicity and local support bigger platforms forgot.
